features.title: Use the real shell to find the first wrong step
tests: entrypoint handoff and route/browser smoke: as the only writer after accepted initialization, change src/main.tsx only from the ScaffoldShell mount to <App /> with no pagehide/pageshow/session listener; build/start the production route at /, load the synthetic distribution case, edit ordered steps, click Check my reasoning, and visibly highlight the deterministic first invalid transition
unit AC-002: reject empty, malformed, nonlinear, second-variable, and zero-denominator input at the earliest line without a misconception
unit/integration AC-003: repeat a two-error fixture ten times and report only the same earliest invalid transition while later lines remain not_evaluated
unit AC-004: prove exact solution-set equivalence for differently written supported equations with no pedagogy dependency

precursor integration/browser proof: classify a valid isolated solution as valid_complete and render no false misconception; this does not claim AC-005 until SLICE-003 implements and visibly offers transfer
unit/benchmark AC-018: cover every supported operator and unique/none/all-real class and record p95 over 100 local analyses
unit/browser AC-023: terminate no-solution and all-real starting equations without transfer or mastery controls

boundary/security AC-028: test below/above every character, token, digit, depth, node, time, and work limit; for construction-time syntactic AST charging, accept public W(96) and reject W(97) at the per-line ceiling, accept the 768-node sequence [96,96,96,96,96,96,96,94,2], and reject the 769-node sequence [96,96,96,96,96,96,96,95,2] specifically at the total ceiling while every equation remains at or below 96 nodes; preserve edits, log metadata only, and make no pedagogy call

features.title: Receive a safe hint, repair the step, and recover from pedagogy failure
tests: route/browser smoke AC-001/AC-008: in the accepted real shell select each of three required fixtures; add a step and assert count/order; edit it and assert text; move it up/down and assert visible order; remove it and assert count/order; then repair the invalid step, rerun, and retain the prior immutable attempt, all with model traffic blocked
contract/browser AC-006: match each seeded invalid fixture's first-invalid index, category, governing rule, reviewed content digest, and visible provenance

unit AC-007/AC-027: reject leakage, enumerated remaining steps, invalid keys/enums/lengths, HTML/script, Markdown links/images, URLs, controls, and semantic mismatch; render only escaped fallback text
fault browser AC-009/AC-015: timeout/invalid/unavailable outcomes preserve all work, append no duplicate attempt, show labeled fallback, and permit one bounded retry
precursor no-key proof: all three fixture diagnosis/repair paths run with model keys absent and provider traffic denied; full AC-014 waits for SLICE-003 transfer and evidence completion
component/browser AC-016: empty, loading, unsupported, too-complex, fallback, success, and reset-confirmation states expose their specified recovery actions

absence audit AC-026: record conditional not-applicable only after proving no production live adapter, endpoint, credential/config, rate/source key, quota/spend journal, provider package, or outbound client
golden/mutation AC-031: every semantic rubric field passes and a deliberately swapped-rule fixture fails

features.title: Prove mastery and inspect the complete teacher and build evidence
tests: route/browser smoke AC-005/AC-010/AC-011: a fully valid isolated solution is labeled valid and visibly offers transfer; after repair display a changed-coefficient, same-skill, unique-solution transfer item and deterministically show mastered/needs_practice for exact rational answers

complete no-key browser AC-014: with all model/API-key variables absent and provider traffic denied, each of the three seeded judge journeys completes through its applicable transfer and matching evidence view
contract/browser AC-012: compare problem, steps, first-invalid index, category, hint provenance, attempts, transfer response, and mastery between learner and evidence panels
component/keyboard/browser AC-013: evidence receives read-only selectors and exposes no edit/reset dispatcher or mutating mouse/keyboard action
content/link AC-019: Build view factually names Codex, GPT-5.6 Sol ultra, the user-created/invoked factory skill, and dated evidence without claiming a live runtime call
repository/dependency AC-020: find no CausalGate import, copied data/branding, or agent-governance flow and confirm the independent Education journey
evidence: .factory/reports/BATCH-138/TASK-181.packet.md (user-deferred before acceptance; partial implementation evidence, if any, is non-acceptance evidence only)

features.title: Make the complete loop private, accessible, responsive, and lifecycle-safe
tests: serialized entrypoint contract: consume the accepted SLICE-001 minimal <App /> mount unchanged by SLICE-002/003; as the sole subsequent/final src/main.tsx writer, prove capture-phase pagehide registration occurs before initial React mount and every exit hides/inerts, epoch-invalidates, aborts, clears refs/caches/tokens/focus, unmounts/nulls root, and removes DOM before destruction/BFCache freeze
browser AC-017: a synthetic marker reaches no application log, storage, request, URL, referrer, or analytics sink and confirmed reset removes it from evidence
browser/accessibility AC-021: keyboard, heading focus, visible focus, announcements, semantics, non-color errors, axe, contrast, 200% text, and no horizontal scroll at 360x800 and 1440x900

local privacy AC-024: request no identity/age/school data, set no tracker/nonessential cookie, show the minor-facing metadata notice, and make no undisclosed third-party request; hosted retention remains the post-handoff gate

browser AC-025: isolated contexts and sequential users remain separate; reset is context-local; reload/navigation/close, real BFCache, and disabled-BFCache restoration expose only the pathname-selected empty state
two-origin AC-029: prove no server session/state cookie/learner mutation endpoint, credentialed wildcard CORS, or cross-origin state change
visible route AC-030: complete distribution diagnosis, safe hint, repair, correct transfer, matching evidence, and Build view within 180 seconds with model traffic blocked
fault E2E AC-032: hold pedagogy unavailable through fallback, correction, transfer mastery, matching evidence, confirmed reset, and empty fixture selection without losing or duplicating attempts

features.title: Produce a locally proven immutable release candidate
tests: local release regression AC-014/AC-030/AC-032: clean no-key build/start runs all seeded flows, timed complete loop, and unavailable-pedagogy-through-reset journey with provider traffic denied

local budgets AC-018/AC-021: retain <=1 second p95 analysis, compressed JS <=200 KiB, initial compressed assets <=350 KiB, both viewports, keyboard/axe, and independent UI evidence on one frozen fingerprint

privacy/security AC-017/AC-024/AC-025/AC-029: local host marker, cookie/storage/referrer/network/log, context/BFCache, cross-origin, route/API, headers, static-manifest, traversal, and metadata-only-log suites pass; hosted retention is explicitly deferred to SLICE-006
provider/content AC-026/AC-027: record live profile N/A only after source/route/bundle/environment/container/network absence and adversarial escaped-rendering evidence
provenance AC-019/AC-020: local release contains factual dated factory links and no CausalGate import/data/flow

supply chain gate: verify lockfile integrity and exact dependency resolution from the official registry; record registry/provenance metadata and inspect every lifecycle script before install execution

supply chain gate: run dependency vulnerability audit with failure policy, license inventory, SBOM generation, secret scan, and production-bundle inspection for provider SDK/config, source maps, tests, personal data, and unexpected origins

evidence contract: capture exact command, cwd, exit code, tool/runtime version, raw output path, and release-candidate fingerprint for clean install, format, lint, typecheck, test, build, audit, license/SBOM, secret, bundle, container, health, shutdown, and rollback checks
evidence: .factory/reports/BATCH-138/TASK-181.packet.md (user-deferred; local release, supply-chain, container, rollback, and certification gates not run)

features.title: Post-handoff authorized hosted and submission validation gates
tests: user-directed emergency override: SLICE-003, SLICE-004, and SLICE-005 remain blocked and unaccepted; readiness authorizes only target creation and post-handoff checks, never infers product completeness, accessibility, privacy lifecycle, local release certification, supply-chain safety, or rollback readiness

minimal external-handoff prerequisite: a separately authorized release worker must create the Git repository and public deployment and perform the submission mutation, then provide the immutable repository digest, deployed artifact digest, environment identifier/URL, submitted artifact/URL, and exact mutation receipts; if any target, authority, or receipt is unavailable, the applicable check is not-run/blocked

risk boundary: Git repository creation, public deployment, and submission mutation are minimum target-creation actions only and are not substitutes for skipped SLICE-005 clean install/build/test, container, dependency audit, license inventory, SBOM, secret scan, bundle inspection, operability, or rollback gates

authority prerequisite: coordinator records explicit public-deployment authority, immutable artifact digest, hosted environment identifier/URL, platform retention owner, hosted/CDN log-source identities, read authority, and the allowed metadata-field schema before any external mutation or hosted audit request

hosted AC-017: after authorized deployment, enter a unique synthetic marker only through the learner equation UI, bind the audit to the immutable artifact digest, environment/log-source identities, and bounded request window, then inspect every accessible application/host/CDN record in that window to prove the marker is absent in raw and encoded form and every retained record contains only the allowed metadata fields; otherwise record not-run/blocked when deployment or log access does not exist, without substituting local SLICE-004/005 evidence

hosted AC-022: after authorized deployment, run three cold-cache normal-broadband measurements and retain usable-UI timing, median, worst, environment, URL, and artifact digest; otherwise record not-run/blocked without substituting local evidence

hosted AC-024: audit platform/CDN logs and retention configuration, cookies, third-party requests, headers, and privacy notice; prove shortest supported retention <=7 days or record not-run/blocked if no authorized target exists

post-submission AC-020: after the coordinator supplies explicit read-only audit authority, immutable repository digest, and submitted artifact/URL, inspect the submission for CausalGate source imports, copied product data, branding, or agent-governance workflow and retain exact query/procedure/results; otherwise record not-run/blocked without weakening the repository audit
rollback: restore the prior immutable digest if the hosted health or privacy gate fails; public video and submission updates remain separate coordinator-authorized work
